query: SELECT id, name, status, category, description, CAST(budget AS CHAR) as budget, CAST(actualSpend AS CHAR) as spend, CAST(metaAdsSpend AS CHAR) as meta_spend, metaAdsCampaignId as meta_id FROM campaigns ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2R3ugynrRDzjYQU.e9d0c4c091a8 --database A5GjFitCrpqWQ2wnoTJiWm --execute SELECT id, name, status, category, description, CAST(budget AS CHAR) as budget, CAST(actualSpend AS CHAR) as spend, CAST(metaAdsSpend AS CHAR) as meta_spend, metaAdsCampaignId as meta_id FROM campaigns ORDER BY id;

rows.name: PBGA Junior Summer Camp
rows.description: Summer golf camp program for juniors aged 7-17. Weekly sessions with PGA coaching, swing analysis, and on-course play.

rows.name: Sunday Clinic
rows.description: Weekly PGA coaching clinic every Sunday. Open to all skill levels. $20 per session (normally $200).

rows.name: PBGA Winter Clinic
rows.description: Winter indoor golf clinic series. 4-week program with PGA instruction, video analysis, and practice drills.

rows.name: $25 1-Hour Trial Session
rows.description: Introductory trial session for new customers. 1 hour on any simulator with full access to 200+ courses.

rows.name: Annual Membership Giveaway
rows.description: 1st Anniversary $7,500 giveaway campaign. Collect applications, convert to memberships. Feb 16 - Mar 31, 2026.

rows.name: Drive Day Competition
rows.description: Monthly longest drive competition. Open to all skill levels. Free with bay rental. Public leaderboard.

rows.name: Instagram Follower Growth
rows.description: Organic and paid Instagram growth campaign. Target 500-800 new followers through content and ads.

rows.name: Corporate Events B2B
rows.description: Corporate team building events, holiday parties, and B2B sales outreach. Target local businesses.

rows.name: Superbowl Watch Party
rows.description: Superbowl watch party event for member engagement and community building
